citations.quote: The subsequent monthly sums due will be shown on the rent schedule to be provided separately to the Tenant.
The tenant will pay the Rent instalments on the due dates as advised by the Accommodation Office.
If the tenant has agreed to a 39-week or 51-week tenancy and paid in full for the total duration before 04 September 2025 they are entitled to a 2% discount.
Rent: £4,686.18 Total Rent (including £500 Advance Rent Payment) £28.23 Per Day

findings.text: The tenancy agreement states a separate rent schedule will be provided to the tenant.
Total rent is £4,686.18 including a £500 advance payment, with a daily rate of £28.23.
Rent instalment due dates are advised by the Accommodation Office, not specified in the agreement.
No separate rent schedule or payment records were found in the provided source materials for NAP-SRC-0010.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Source Review: NAP-SRC-0010

**Task:** Locate separate rent schedule and payment records for NAP-SRC-0010

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0010 - MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf

**Findings:**
- The tenancy agreement (clause 2(a)) explicitly states that a separate rent schedule will be provided to the tenant showing monthly instalment amounts.
- Clause 2(b) states that instalment due dates are advised by the Accommodation Office.
- The total rent is £4,686.18, with a daily rate of £28.23, and a £500 advance payment is acknowledged.
- **No separate rent schedule or payment records were found in the provided source materials.**

**Recommendation:** A follow-up task is proposed to search for the separate rent schedule and any payment records (e.g., accommodation account statements, receipts) in other matter sources or artifacts.
proposed_artifacts.title: Source Review: NAP-SRC-0010 Rent Schedule and Payment Records

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search the matter's source inventory and artifacts for any document titled or referencing a 'rent schedule', 'payment schedule', 'instalment plan', or 'accommodation account statement' related to tenant MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA (Edinburgh Napier number 40805511) for the tenancy period 13 March 2026 to 25 August 2026. Also search for any payment receipts, bank transfer confirmations, or accommodation account statements showing payments made by or on behalf of the tenant. Report the document IDs, dates, amounts, and any discrepancies.
proposed_tasks.title: Search for separate rent schedule and payment records for NAP-SRC-0010

risk_flags.text: Absence of the separate rent schedule may hinder verification of payment obligations and arrears calculation.
Without payment records, it is uncertain whether the tenant has paid the £500 advance rent or any instalments.

summary: Reviewed NAP-SRC-0010 (Student Licence). The tenancy agreement references a separate rent schedule and payment records not included in the source. No rent schedule or payment records were found in the provided source materials. A follow-up task is proposed to locate these separate records.

uncertainties.text: The separate rent schedule referenced in clause 2(a) is not included in the provided source materials.
Actual payment records (e.g., receipts, bank statements, accommodation account statements) are not available in the current evidence set.
The exact instalment amounts and due dates are unknown without the separate rent schedule.
